name: Walsh Family Barbecue Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Use sweet onions like Maui or Texas Sweet.
2. Place half of the onion rings in the crockpot.
3. Add the roast and then the remaining onions to the crockpot.
4. Pour in 1 cup of ginger ale. Cover and cook on LOW for 8-10 hours, or until pork can be easily shredded.
5. Remove pork from the pot and shred it.
6. Remove onions and add them to the shredded pork in a bowl.
7. Discard any remaining juice in the pot.
8. Return onions and pork to the crockpot, then add barbecue sauce and mix.
9. Continue cooking on LOW for 3-4 hours.
10. Makes great barbecue sandwiches.
11. Freeze leftovers in ice cube trays. When frozen, remove cubes to zip bags.
12. Thaw: 2-3 cubes for a sandwich; 1 cube for baked potato topping; 2-3 cubes for barbecue pork pasta.
